Name: FeedBackBlur-Editor[Yebis]
Description: Applies a temporal feedback blur effect by blending the current frame with previous frames. Used to create motion trails, persistence effects, or stylized ghosting based on accumulated history.

Fields.Name: Enable Feedback Blur
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the feedback blur effect. When disabled, no temporal accumulation or motion persistence is applied.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Controls how much of the previous frame is blended into the current frame. Higher values increase persistence and trail length but may cause stronger ghosting.

Fields.Name: Feedback Time Factor
Fields.Description: Time factor (in seconds) used to normalize feedback accumulation. Controls how quickly the blur decays over time.

Fields.Name: Object Feedback Blur Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly moving objects contribute to the feedback blur effect. Higher values increase motion trail intensity.

Fields.Name: Object Feedback Blur Falloff
Fields.Description: Determines how quickly the blur effect fades based on object motion or distance. Higher values produce faster decay.

Fields.Name: Object Feedback Blur Power
Fields.Description: Exponent applied to the blur accumulation, shaping how aggressively the effect builds up over time.
